Animated Layer Preview

This assembles every boss sprite from basicObjs position, image offset, scale, angle, and layer order. Rotating parts use their source rotationSpeed. 24 of 24 sprite parts rendered.

Boss Sprite Parts

These are the visual parts from basicObjs. Multi-part bosses are built by layering these sprites in-game.
